t_ch: 因为，他正是「英雄」的化身。
t_en: It's because he is the very embodiment of a "hero."

t_ch: 嗯…你是谁？
t_en: Hmm... Who are you?

t_ch: 看来，你已经归于「空白」了。
t_en: So, you've returned to a "blank space."

t_ch: 但对我而言，这是第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次，也是最后一次，在世界尽头与你重逢。
t_en: But for me, this is the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th time, and the last time, that I meet you at the end of the world.

t_ch: 他们已在路上了。若是与我相遇，场面想必会无法控制吧？
t_en: They're already on their way. Should they cross paths with me... I imagine things may spiral out of control.

t_ch: 三千…什么？「他们」又是谁？
t_en: Thirty million... what? And who are "they"?

t_ch: 别在意，孩子。继续瞻仰吧，在他身上，你看见了什么？
t_en: Pay it no mind, child. Keep looking there... What do you see in him?
Mmm...

t_ch: 虽然乍一看只是座雕像，但是……
t_en: It looks like just a statue, but...

t_ch: 好奇怪，他好像有体温。很…温暖。
t_en: It's weird... He's warm. Like, really warm.

t_ch: 不妨也用上听觉。
t_en: Why not listen as well?

t_ch: 嗯…我听见……
t_en: Um... I hear something...

t_ch: 他身上，有许多裂缝…在发出…像是有人在呻吟的声音，好可怕。
t_en: There are cracks all over him... and they're making this sound... like someone's groaning. It's scary.

t_ch: 他不会…快要碎掉了吧？
t_en: Is he... Is he gonna fall apart?

t_ch: 很遗憾，孩子。
t_en: How unfortunate, child.

t_ch: 这个男人，宁愿支离破碎，也不肯倒下。
t_en: This man would rather fall to pieces than fall to his knees.

t_ch: 你可以把我视作一名…雕塑师。我穷尽一生，只完成了两件作品。
t_en: You might think of me as... a sculptor. Across all my years, I only completed two pieces.

t_ch: 在他人眼中，它们可谓「杰出」。但只有我自己知晓，其中有多少遗憾。
t_en: Others may call them "masterpieces." But only I know how many regrets they truly hold.

t_ch: 遗憾？
t_en: Regrets?

t_ch: 我的第一尊作品，已经离我而去。而这第二尊作品，它本应是完美的。
t_en: My first creation left me long ago. This second one... it was meant to be perfect.

t_ch: 直到这一刻来临前，我都如此深信。
t_en: I believed it with all my heart... until this very moment.

t_ch: 听不懂。你是说，你的想法改变了？
t_en: I don't get it. Are you saying you've changed your mind?

t_ch: 我不会改变，但愿意承认：那十二块石料未经打磨，却比任何雕像都精致万倍。
t_en: I won't change. But I'll admit this: Those twelve stones, unpolished as they are, are a thousand times more exquisite than any statue.

t_ch: 仿佛在嘲笑我，一个失败的雕塑家——<color=#dbc291ff>只因经我之手，它们天生的卓越注定受到折损，乃至荡然无存。</color>
t_en: It's as if they are mocking me, a failed sculptor, <color=#dbc291ff>whose touch can only diminish what was born to shine, until nothing remains.</color>

t_ch: 呵呵，生来第一次，我意识到了……
t_en: Hehe, for the first time in my life, I've realized....

t_ch: 这幅躯壳，也不过是承载了{RUBY_B#赞达尔}第一位天才{RUBY_E#}「偏执」的分身。
t_en: This vessel is merely an avatar made to contain the {RUBY_B#Zandar}First Genius{RUBY_E#}'s "paranoia."

t_ch: 被镌刻在机核中枢的钢印，只容许我追寻唯一的目标：「毁灭」。
t_en: The seal etched into my mechanical core permits me to pursue only one purpose: Destruction.

t_ch: 相比之下，那十二块发光的原石……
t_en: Compared to me, those twelve glowing, unrefined stones...

t_ch: 它们拥有的自由，或许远在我之上啊。
t_en: May have lived with more freedom than I ever had.

t_ch: 这是你的忏悔吗，吕枯耳戈斯阁下？
t_en: Is this your confession, Lord Lycurgus?

t_ch: 您误会了。「我」在诞生之初，就注定不会产生「悔恨」的情感。
t_en: You misunderstand. From the very beginning, "I" was never meant to feel "regret."

t_ch: 但既然，你会为这些石料的光芒所苦恼……
t_en: But since you're troubled by the radiance of these stones...

t_ch: 也许，在三千万世「徒劳」过后，你也意识到了——自己同样是命运的囚徒。
t_en: Perhaps, after thirty million "futile" cycles, you too have realized... you're just as much a prisoner of fate.

t_ch: 我想，您的话不无道理。
t_en: I suppose you do have a point.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 现在，你已经被天外的智者囚禁。
t_en: Now, you are imprisoned by the sages from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 正因如此，这是我最后一次，以「神礼观众」的身份驻足。
t_en: And that is why this will be my last time standing here as the Theoros.

t_ch: 尽管立场不同，但我们都在等待一场奇迹。
t_en: Though we stand on opposite sides, we are both waiting for a miracle.

t_ch: 你们，到底在说什么……
t_en: What are you talking about...?

t_ch: 是有什么大事要发生了吗？
t_en: Is something big about to happen?

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 阿雅……
t_en: Agy...

t_ch: 我明白。
t_en: I know.

t_ch: 既然你胜券在握，想必不会介意，给我们一些私人空间？
t_en: Now that your victory is assured, I trust you won't mind giving us a moment in private?

t_ch: 胜券在握吗？未必。但我无意久留，因为不想扰了那几位「救世主」的兴致……
t_en: Assured? Not quite. But I won't stay long. I'd rather not spoil the fun for those Deliverers...

t_ch: 也因为在一无所有后，我唯一剩下的，唯有「求知」的动力。
t_en: And besides, after losing everything, the only thing that remains in me is the drive to "seek knowledge."

t_ch: 我同情你，神礼观众。
t_en: I pity you, Theoros.

t_ch: 我不需要你的同情。
t_en: I don't need your pity.

t_ch: 永别了，「金织」女士。
t_en: Farewell, Lady Goldweaver.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 小白，让你久等啦。
t_en: Sorry to keep you waiting, Snowy.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 我们，是来接你回家的。
t_en: We're here to take you home.

t_ch: 回家？
t_en: Home?

t_ch: 我不明白。这里，难道不是家吗？
t_en: I don't understand. Isn't this my home?

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 这里不是真正的家。家应该是一个温馨的地方，能让人放下所有的负担，舒舒服服地睡上很久、很久……
t_en: This isn't a real home. A home should be a warm, cozy place where you can let go of all your burdens and sleep peacefully for a long, long time...

t_ch: 可是，我睡不着。
t_en: But I can't sleep.

t_ch: 每当困了，就会有一道声音传来。
t_en: Every time I feel drowsy, there's a voice.

t_ch: 「不要睡下，否则灾难就会降临。」那声音很虚弱，也很严厉……
t_en: "You mustn't sleep, or disaster will come." It sounds really weak, but also kinda strict...

t_ch: 它不会再妨碍你入睡了，孩子。
t_en: It won't disturb your sleep anymore, child.

t_ch: 无数个夜晚，你别无选择。但现在，你的使命结束了。
t_en: For countless nights, you had no other choice. But now, your mission has come to an end.

t_ch: 和我们一起，将自己的心愿送向明天吧。
t_en: Join us, and send your own wish towards tomorrow.

t_ch: 我的愿望…是什么呢？
t_en: My wish... what could it be?

t_ch: 不必强迫自己给出答案，孩子。
t_en: You don't have to come up with an answer right now, child.

t_ch: 大人会把责任和理想当作心愿。但「愿望」…本该是至为纯粹，至为美好的事物。
t_en: Grown-ups often think duty and ideals are wishes. But a true wish... should be the purest, most beautiful thing of all.

t_ch: 只有真正自由的人，才能勾勒出它的形状。
t_en: It can only take form in the hands of someone who is truly free.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 那么，小白……
t_en: So, Snowy...

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 你愿意跟上我们，去追逐自己的愿望吗？
t_en: Will you come with us to chase after your own wish?

t_ch: 我…想离开这里。
t_en: I... I want to leave this place.

t_ch: 我想去…找到它！
t_en: I want to... go find it!

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 那真是，太好啦。
t_en: I'm glad to hear it.

t_ch: 最后的逐火之旅，一如过往三千万次……
t_en: The final Flame-Chase Journey, just like the thirty million before it...

t_ch: 牵住我们的手，一起出发吧。
t_en: Take our hands, and come with us.

t_ch: 小白厄的影子，跑到哪儿去了？
t_en: Where did little Phainon's shadow run off to?
Look!

t_ch: 他已经先一步，奔向自己的命运了。
t_en: He's already gone ahead to embrace his destiny.

t_ch: 终于来了，救世主们。
t_en: You've finally arrived, Deliverers.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 好久不见，大家。
t_en: Long time no see, everyone.

t_ch: 很少见你这么放松，阿格莱雅。
t_en: You don't usually look this relaxed, Aglaea.

t_ch: 听你这么说，我很高兴。
t_en: I'm glad to hear that.

t_ch: 想你了，缇宝老师。
t_en: I missed you, Lady Tribbie.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: *我们*也很想念你，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: We miss you too, {NICKNAME}!

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 还有…虽然已经见过面了，但亲眼看见她的「种子」开出花，还是很感慨呀。
t_en: And... even though we've met before, it's still moving to see her "seed" bloom like this.

t_ch: 以「记忆」为帛，这身华服如此耀眼……
t_en: Woven from Remembrance, this garment gleams so brilliantly...

t_ch: 恰如此时此刻，众人将为翁法罗斯编织的「未来」。
t_en: Just like the "future" we will now weave together for Amphoreus.

t_ch: 这里，就是终点了。
t_en: We've reached the end.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 对，只需穿过最后的「门径」。
t_en: Yeah, we just have to go through the final Passage.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 小白…已经提前出发了。
t_en: Snowy... has already gone ahead.

t_ch: 那扇门背后，会是什么？
t_en: What lies behind that door?

t_ch: 「铁墓的第一道封印，是白厄以尸骨垒砌的沙场。」
t_en: "The first seal upon Irontomb was a battlefield, raised from the bones of Phainon himself."

t_ch: 「第二道，是他内心渴望的投射，他的『愿望』和『绝望』。」
t_en: "The second seal was a reflection of his inner desires, his 'wishes' and his 'despair.'"

t_ch: 「他用悔恨、愤怒、叹息，串联起来时的道路……」
t_en: "A path he wove together with regret, wrath, and sighs...."

t_ch: 「当这一切全部散去，他能用来囚禁『毁灭』的力量，还剩下什么呢？」
t_en: "When all of this is gone, what will he have left to hold back the Destruction?"

t_ch: 「答案已经呼之欲出。」
t_en: "The answer is all but revealed."

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 这里遍地是他存在的痕迹，甚至能听见遥远的心跳，唯独缺少一样东西……
t_en: His traces are everywhere. You can even hear distant heartbeats, but one thing is missing...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>他的…「自我」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>His... "sense of self."</color>

t_ch: 世人都以为，刻法勒早已陨落。但它以一丝「自我」为锚，屹立千年，只为在黑潮中庇佑众生。
t_en: The world believed Kephale had long since perished. But they held fast, anchored by a sliver of "self," standing for a thousand years to shelter all life from the black tide.

t_ch: 白厄在做的事，并无不同。
t_en: What Phainon is doing now is no different.

t_ch: 而我们要做的事，也同样如此。
t_en: And what we must do is also no different.

t_ch: 就让「记忆」化作流星，再一次，划破沉睡的长夜吧。
t_en: Then let Remembrance burn bright like a shooting star, and once more, pierce the long night of slumber.

t_ch: 收拾好心情，准备出发？踏出这一步，就不会再回头啦。
t_en: Take a moment to gather yourself. Once you take this step, there's no turning back.

t_ch: 出发吧，迈向决战。
t_en: Let's go. It's time for the decisive battle.

t_ch: 还没准备好…
t_en: I'm not ready yet...

t_ch: 没关系，我等你。我们都会等你。
t_en: It's all right. I'll wait for you. We all will.

t_ch: 此后，将是决定众星明灭的一战……
t_en: What follows is a battle that will decide the fate of the stars...

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 乘着西风，所有人一同出发！
t_en: Riding the west wind, let's all head out together!

t_ch: 权杖曾赋予我们冰冷的名讳。
t_en: The scepter once bestowed upon us names of cold command.

s_ch: 万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝
t_ch: 神谕也千万次昭告不变的命运。
t_en: The prophecy spoke of our unchanging fates, time and time again.

t_ch: 但在「开拓」和「创世」笔下：明日，星星会如此传唱……
t_en: But under the pens of Trailblazing and Genesis, the stars shall thus sing of tomorrow...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「门径的圣子，缇里西庇俄丝——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Tribios, Holy Child of Passage..."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「浪漫的织者，阿格莱雅——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Aglaea, Weaver of Romance..."</color>

t_ch: 「逐火的尽头，她们再度沐浴黄金……」
t_en: "At the journey's end, they shall bathe in gold once more..."

t_ch: 「翻越万千门径，直至追回失却的一切。」
t_en: "Through myriad passages, until all that was lost is reclaimed."

t_ch: 你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
t_en: Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?

t_ch: 轮回的尽头，万物消散。在这场梦里，你会醒来，重新成为爱笑的孩子。
t_en: The world dissipates at the end of the cycle. In this dream, you will awaken again, and become once more that boy who loved to laugh.

t_ch: 可若你睁开双眼，回望昨天，便能看见命运清澈的足迹。
t_en: But if you open your eyes and look back on yesterday, you'll see destiny's footprints, clear as day.

t_ch: 最后，那「憎恨」的烈火也被一阵风拂去……
t_en: At last, the raging fire of "hatred" is swept away by a breeze...

t_ch: 只留下「爱」将时光铭记。
t_en: Leaving only "love" to remember the passage of time.

t_ch: 西风尽头，竟是一片狼藉的沙场啊。
t_en: So this is what lies at the end of the west wind... a ravaged battlefield.

t_ch: 「焚风」？这名字像我跟小王子合体啊。
t_en: Zephyro? Sounds like someone fused me and the little prince into one name.

t_ch: 「哎哟。小王子，你也在呢？」
t_en: "Well, well. If it isn't the little prince himself."

t_ch: 「久违了，赛法利娅女士。」
t_en: "It's been a while, Lady Cifera."

t_ch: 「咱们同行的桥段可不多见。」
t_en: "It's not everyday we get to walk the same road."

t_ch: 「二缺一，不知蜗居公主什么时候来？」
t_en: "We're one player short. When's Princess Homebody showing up?"

t_ch: 就连这具身躯，也被你铸成了枷锁么？
t_en: So even this vessel... you've forged into a shackle?

t_ch: 「干嘛搞这么伤感？」
t_en: "Why so sentimental?"

t_ch: 「抱歉，只是习惯。」
t_en: "Sorry, force of habit."

t_ch: 「好大一颗球啊。轮到谁表演了？」
t_en: "That's a big one. So, who's up for a show?"

t_ch: 「纹丝不动哪。灰子，只一会儿没见，退步成这样了？」
t_en: "Not budging an inch, huh? Really, Gray Mystery? I leave you alone for a bit and you're already this rusty?"

t_ch: 「说起来，赛飞儿小姐，多洛斯人…都很喜欢球类吗？」
t_en: "Speaking of which, Miss Cipher, do Dolosians... all like spherical things?"

t_ch: 「当然喜欢——等等，这不是重点！」
t_en: "Of course we do... Wait, that's not the point!"

t_ch: 「重点不是，这家伙挡在路上了吗？」
t_en: "Isn't the real issue that this thing's in the way?"

t_ch: 似乎搞错了什么。
t_en: Seems like something got mixed up.

t_ch: 「岁月」泰坦另有其人…
t_en: The Time Titan is someone else...

t_ch: 对哦，轮到本姑娘出马了？
t_en: Oh right, it's my turn to shine now?

t_ch: 看我的吧！这新鲜的「岁月」神力——
t_en: Watch this! The fresh power of Time!

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯祷言，还记得吗？
t_en: Remember Oronyx's Prayer?

t_ch: 当然，可别小看我……
t_en: Of course I do! C'mon, give me some credit...

t_ch: 「揭开记忆的被褥——」
t_en: "Lift the beddings of memory..."

t_ch: 「——激起往昔的涟漪！」
t_en: "—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

t_ch: 怎么样，比{NICKNAME}强多了吧？
t_en: See? Way better than {NICKNAME}, right?

t_ch: 要是能把祝词念对，还能更厉害些。
t_en: You'd be even more impressive if you could recite the prayer correctly.

t_ch: 不过「记忆的被褥」…还真令人在意呢。
t_en: But "beddings of memory"... does catch your attention.

t_ch: 至、至少押韵啦！
t_en: A—At least it still rhymes!

t_ch: 地底深处，竟然是一座花园……
t_en: There's a whole garden down here...?

t_ch: 不可思议。地脉的气息…天差地别。
t_en: Incredible. The energy in the earth's veins here... It's completely different.

t_ch: 「这便是赛飞儿女士为他编织的美梦……」
t_en: "This is the sweet dream Lady Cipher wove for him..."

t_ch: 「一个宁静、温柔的新世界。」
t_en: "A peaceful, gentle new world."

t_ch: 看，地底下的剑刃已经断了……
t_en: Look, the blade down here's already snapped...

t_ch: 就像他的心神，残破不堪。
t_en: Just like his mind, shattered and broken.

t_ch: 可那道光，似曾相识……
t_en: But that light... it looks familiar...

t_ch: 果然，是{RUBY_B#「毁灭」的神血}「净世金血」{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: Yes, it's the {RUBY_B#the Destruction's divine blood}world-cleansing blood{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 直到现在，你依旧在闪烁么……
t_en: Still shimmering... after all this time?

t_ch: 「这弯弯绕绕的性子，是他没错。」
t_en: "This roundabout way of doing things... is definitely him."

t_ch: 「金色的光，画出归乡的路……」
t_en: "Golden light... tracing the way home..."

t_ch: 「可惜咱们的目的地，和诗里完全相反哪。」
t_en: "Shame our destination's the exact opposite of the one in your poem."

t_ch: 「粉色」的光，终于齐聚了呢。
t_en: All the "pink" lights have finally come together.

t_ch: 「这片净土，也在遭受『毁灭』浸染。」
t_en: "Even this pure land is being tainted by the Destruction."

t_ch: 「另寻出路吧？我们需要<color=#dbc291ff>他</color>的智慧。」
t_en: "Shall we seek another way? <color=#dbc291ff>His</color> wisdom may be what we need."

t_ch: 光的边界外…是什么？
t_en: What lies beyond the edge of the light?

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 混沌。身负「卡厄斯兰那」之名——
t_en: Chaos. To bear the name Khaslana...

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>必先投身混沌，为最初的光谋求出路。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>One must first plunge into chaos, to seek a path for the primordial light.</color>

t_ch: 「冲破阴影后，是黎明的轮廓。」
t_en: "Beyond the shadows... lies the outline of dawn."

t_ch: 「只有同时背负光与影，才能走过轮转的晨昏。」
t_en: "Only by bearing both light and shadow can one traverse the cycles of dawn and dusk."

t_ch: 「为什么…为什么…？！」
t_en: "WHY... WHY IS THIS HAPPENING!?"

t_ch: 「所谓天降的救世主，终究是从尘土中崛起。」
t_en: "Even the Deliverer from the sky must have their beginning in the soil of the nations."

t_ch: 「以『世界』为师者…方能背负它的命运。」
t_en: "Only one who treats the world as their teacher... can bear its eventual destiny."

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 他不曾料到，宏伟的圣城，也远非守护的尽头。
t_en: He never expected that the majestic holy city would be far from the end of what needed to be protected.

t_ch: 目中所见的景色愈发广阔，扛起的事物也愈发沉重。
t_en: The farther his gaze reached, the more weight he came to bear.

t_ch: 可偏偏这一切，他都没能守住。
t_en: But in the end, he couldn't hold on to any of it.

t_ch: 这枚晶体…很安静。
t_en: This crystal... is quiet.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 洞穴的囚徒，终究难言世界的全貌。
t_en: A prisoner in the cave can never truly describe the world in its entirety.

t_ch: 但即便如此，他也会选择将它背负。
t_en: Yet even so, he would still choose to bear it.

t_ch: 「火焰尚有缺欠。必须…助长火焰。」
t_en: "The blaze was still not enough. It had to be fed..."

t_ch: 「惟有…助长火焰。方能烧熔…那绝望的未来。」
t_en: "Only by... feeding the flames... can we melt... that hopeless future."

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 那心间的回响还未散去。
t_en: The echo in his heart still lingers.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 救世主，先把「负世」的愿望带上吧。
t_en: Deliverer, take the wish of Worldbearing with you first.

t_ch: 背负「负世」的愿望。
t_en: Bear the wish of Worldbearing.

t_ch: 印记只有一半。另一半在哪里？
t_en: We only have half of the mark. Where's the other half?

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 拿去，我带你们去下一座考场。
t_en: Take this. I'll bring you to the next test.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 你怀里那本又厚又重的大部头，肯定还装得下一位文弱学者吧？
t_en: That massive tome you're holding must have room for one more scholar, I presume?

t_ch: 当然。它能装下整个世界。
t_en: Of course. It can hold the whole world.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 载我一程吧，省下徒步的工夫，我好专心思考。
t_en: Then give me a lift, would you? I'd rather save my energy and use the time to think.

t_ch: 「就算是神明，也不能忽视锻炼呀？」
t_en: "Even gods shouldn't skip exercise, you know?"

t_ch: 「风堇小姐…说得没错。」
t_en: "Miss Hyacine... is right."

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯

t_ch: 那，在「开拓」见证下，群星会记得「阿那克萨戈拉斯」驳斥神明……
t_en: Then, with the Trailblaze as witness, the stars shall remember how Anaxagoras refuted the gods...

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>没必要——「理性的学士，那刻夏」——简单点，更方便后人质疑。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>No need for that. Anaxa, Scholar of Reason... keeping it simple makes it easier for future minds to question.</color>

t_ch: 「走吧，表演还远未到谢幕时分。」
t_en: "Go. The closing act is still far ahead."

t_ch: 「搞什么，人这么多？」
t_en: "What is this? A conference?"

t_ch: 「欢迎！找个位子随便坐！」
t_en: "Welcome! Take a seat anywhere you like!"

t_ch: 「该死，偏头痛都要犯了。」
t_en: "Ugh, I'm getting a migraine."

t_ch: 你我似乎被隔绝在外了啊。
t_en: It seems like we've been shut out.

t_ch: 在我看来，这不是坏事。
t_en: I don't think that's a bad thing.

t_ch: 「这样就算治愈了吧？」
t_en: "Looks like that cured it, huh?"

t_ch: 「小小一簇毒株，竟能滋生出席卷寰宇的灾祸。」
t_en: "To think such a tiny pathogen could spawn a calamity that engulfs the entire universe."

t_ch: 「也不奇怪。看看它肚子里——仙之人兮列如麻啊。」
t_en: "No wonder. Look at what's in its belly... Demigods packed in like sardines in a can."

t_ch: 可不能乱发脾气呀，小白——
t_en: Now now, don't lose your temper, Snowy.

t_ch: 情绪稳定，才是乖孩子。
t_en: Good kids keep their emotions in check.

t_ch: 「这声音，是缇宝阿姐们！」
t_en: "That voice... It's the Tribbie sisters!"

t_ch: 「此地没有黑潮……」
t_en: "There is no black tide here..."

t_ch: 「却是另一片战场。」
t_en: "But it is a battlefield all the same."

t_ch: 「逐火的征程，只剩下最后二人。」
t_en: "Only two remain on this Flame-Chase Journey."

t_ch: 「想也知道，她们总是走在最前线啊。」
t_en: "Figures. They're always leading from the front line."

t_ch: 这次，是光在拒绝我们呢。
t_en: Looks like the light's turning us away this time.

t_ch: 要为世界带去黎明，就必须永远栖身长夜。
t_en: To bring the world its dawn is to dwell forever in the night.

t_ch: 最初的涟漪，消散了……
t_en: The first ripple has faded...

t_ch: 然后，是漫漫苦旅的开始。
t_en: And so begins a long and arduous journey.

t_ch: 「无尽的杀戮，无尽的徒劳。」
t_en: "Endless slaughter... all for nothing."

t_ch: 「真是非人的折磨啊……」
t_en: "That's more than anyone should be made to suffer..."

t_ch: 即便是解脱的时候，他心里剩下的…也只有「绝望」了吗？
t_en: Even when it was finally over, all that remained in him... was "despair"?

t_ch: 但他用怒火换来的一滴血，指引我们行至此处。
t_en: But even so, the drop of blood wrung from his wrath has guided us here.

t_ch: （白厄，我们做到了。）
t_en: (We did it, Phainon.)

t_ch: 我的愿望……
t_en: My wish...

t_ch: 就是实现大家的愿望！
t_en: Is to fulfill everyone else's wishes!

t_ch: 「真是，绕了好远的路啊。」
t_en: "We really took the long way around."

t_ch: 「这样一来，所有人都到齐了。」
t_en: "Well, now everyone's here."

t_ch: 权杖的中枢，铁墓的温床……
t_en: The Scepter's mainframe, and Irontomb's breeding ground...

t_ch: 我们终于看清它的样貌了。
t_en: We're finally seeing its true form.

t_ch: 到处都是一片红，可气氛却截然相反，好阴森……
t_en: It's red everywhere, and the atmosphere is super creepy...

t_ch: 那是「智识」的冰冷。
t_en: That would be the Erudition's coldness.

t_ch: 但很快，它就会被「毁灭」的热浪吞没。
t_en: But it will soon be engulfed by the Destruction's heat.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆先生！
t_en: Mr. Screwllum!

t_ch: 终于，世界内外连通了。这是翁法罗斯距离银河最近的一刻。
t_en: This world's insides are finally connected to the outside. This is the moment when Amphoreus is closest to the cosmos.

t_ch: 小家伙们，干得漂亮。
t_en: Nicely done, little ones.

t_ch: 有斯蒂芬•劳艾德和他的骇客朋友们坐镇，权杖的屏蔽协议不会再生效了。
t_en: With Stephen Lloyd and his hacker friends here, the Scepter's block protocol will no longer take effect.

t_ch: 现在，世界内部的时间流速已经完全和现实宇宙同步。
t_en: The speed of time within Amphoreus has finally been synced with that of the real universe.

t_ch: 也就是说，决战的时刻到了。
t_en: In other words, it's time for the decisive battle.

t_ch: 银河的命运，在此一役。
t_en: The fate of the cosmos hangs in this battle.

t_ch: 我们会让银河的命运驶向正轨。
t_en: We will guide the fate of the cosmos onto the right track.

t_ch: 心态很好，记得保持。你们冲在最前线，所有人可都看着。
t_en: That's the spirit. Remember to keep at it. You lot are the vanguards of this battle. Everyone's watching.

t_ch: 各司其职吧，我们会赢。
t_en: Let's each do our duty. We've got this.

t_ch: 各司其职，我们会赢。胜利属于银河联军！
t_en: Let's each do our duty. We've got this. Victory belongs to the Cosmic Alliance!

t_ch: 嚯，这么会说场面话？那就好，你们冲在最前线，所有人可都看着。
t_en: Wow. You're good at this. You lot are the vanguards of this battle. Everyone's watching.

t_ch: 这就是星球大战吗…
t_en: Are we in "star wars"...?

t_ch: 我最喜欢的星际战争情节，终于要来了？！
t_en: Are we finally getting an intergalactic warfare arc? That's my favorite!

t_ch: 这时候还有心思开玩笑？要是所有人都和你一样乐观，我们早赢了。
t_en: You're still in the mood to crack jokes? We would have won way sooner if everyone were as optimistic as you.

t_ch: 还有一件事，各位理应知情——
t_en: There's one more thing that everyone should know...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>博识尊，向翁法罗斯投来了目光。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Nous has cast THEIR gaze upon Amphoreus.</color>

t_ch: 计算中的时刻将要来临。这一战的结果，会成为「智识」数算的新锚点。
t_en: The calculated Instant is coming. The outcome of this battle will become a new anchor for the Erudition's computations.

t_ch: 祂的注视，没有让权杖过载么？
t_en: THEIR gaze didn't overload the Scepter?

t_ch: 很遗憾，我们不得不做出合理的推测：铁墓的诞生，始终在星神的计算中。
t_en: Unfortunately, we have to go with this reasonable assumption: The birth of Irontomb had always been within that Aeon's calculations.

t_ch: 但，没有关系……
t_en: But don't worry...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯最不缺少的奇迹，就是「战胜命运」，对吧？
t_en: The one miracle that Amphoreus was never short on is "defeating destiny," no?

t_ch: 结果的意义，由「开拓」决定。
t_en: The Trailblaze will determine the outcome's meaning.

t_ch: 变量的作用，莫过于此。
t_en: That is what a variable is for.

t_ch: 没错，让星神也好好见识下我们的厉害！
t_en: Yup. Let's show the Aeon how powerful we are!

t_ch: 放手干吧，每个人都是。
t_en: Good luck, all of you.

t_ch: 以螺丝星「帝王」的名义，我祝愿诸位：旗开得胜。
t_en: As the ruler of Planet Screwllum, I wish all of you: victory.

t_ch: 不妨想象，阿基维利和祂的旅伴也曾站在类似的山口，不止一回……
t_en: It's not hard to imagine that Akivili and THEIR companions must've also stood on the precipice of many similar crises before...

t_ch: 银河或许远比人们想象中更脆弱，命运有时只悬于一次小小的抉择。
t_en: Perhaps the cosmos is much more fragile than people think. Sometimes, destiny hinges on only a small choice.

t_ch: 但最后，所有往事都将化作「记忆」，汇成讲述星空的寓言集。
t_en: But in the end, everything will turn into "memories," converging into a collection of fables about the stars.

t_ch: 而这一次，主人公们甚至想自行著述。
t_en: The difference this time is that the protagonists are daring to write their own stories.

t_ch: 探索、了解、建立、连结——其实还有第五个词汇，尽管没有被写入章程，却常伴无名客左右。
t_en: Explore, understand, establish, and connect... Although unwritten, there's actually a fifth word in the creed that has always accompanied the Nameless.

t_ch: 「拯救」。
t_en: "Salvation."

t_ch: 这两个字总是主动来敲门。心软的列车长，也从来不会拒绝它们。
t_en: It is a word that often comes knocking at our door, and our softhearted conductor never turned anyone down.

t_ch: 所以，一如既往，去拯救这个遍体鳞伤的世界吧，孩子们。而这一站……
t_en: So, go save this bruised and battered world just as we always have, kids. On this stop...

t_ch: 整片星空都将是你们的旅伴。
t_en: The entire cosmos will be your travelling companion.

t_ch: 也要注意脚下呀，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Make sure you watch your footing, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 史诗的最后一页，让我们一步、一步，和所有人一起走完吧？
t_en: Let us walk through the final page of this saga with everyone one step at a time, shall we?

t_ch: 白厄。
t_en: Phainon.

t_ch: 还记得当初的约定吗？
t_en: Do you remember the promise we made back then?

t_ch: 我来兑现承诺了。
t_en: I'm here to fulfill it.

t_ch: 黎明就要升起了。
t_en: The dawn is about to rise.

t_ch: 世界会被我们拯救。
t_en: We will save the world.

t_ch: 当然。真是一场苦等啊，搭档。
t_en: Of course. It has been a bitter wait, partner.

t_ch: 唯独启程的信念，我绝不会忘记。
t_en: But I never forget what set me on this path.

t_ch: 而今，「铁墓」在「白厄」的胸膛中颤动。凭借这具空无一物的身躯，我已成为它完美无缺的容器……
t_en: "Irontomb" now trembles in "Phainon's" chest. With this empty body, I have become its perfect vessel...

t_ch: 和命中注定的棺木。
t_en: And its destined casket.

t_ch: 你知道该怎么做，搭档。
t_en: You know what to do, partner.

t_ch: 不必再考验我的决心。
t_en: No need to keep testing my resolve.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯已经做好准备。
t_en: Amphoreus is prepared.

t_ch: 我来接过你反抗的接力棒。
t_en: I'll take up the torch of your resistance.

t_ch: 「铭记过去，成为明天的英雄。」
t_en: "Remember the past, and become the hero of tomorrow."

t_ch: 与我一同，成为英雄吧。
t_en: Stand with me, and become heroes.

t_ch: 求之不得。
t_en: That's all I've ever wanted.

t_ch: 我粉碎棺木，为铁墓送葬！
t_en: I'll shatter coffins to lay Irontomb to rest!

t_ch: 终于。旅途的尽头。
t_en: Finally. The end of this journey.

t_ch: 我们所有人。在辽阔的星空下。重逢。
t_en: All of us. Reuniting. Beneath a vast. Endless sky.

t_ch: 「迷迷」。
t_en: Mem.

t_ch: 嗯，是我……
t_en: Yes. It's me...

t_ch: 你想说的话，我会替她铭记。
t_en: I will remember what you want to say to her.

t_ch: 不必了。我能看见……
t_en: No need. I can see...

t_ch: 她就在这里。所有牺牲的伙伴。愿望。都在这里。
t_en: That she's right here. All the companions who sacrificed themselves. Their wishes. It's all here.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我们。做到了吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Have we... succeeded?</color>

t_ch: …我想，是的。
t_en: ...I think we have.

t_ch: 明天，群星会将逐火之旅的故事口口相传。
t_en: Tomorrow, the stars will sing of the story of the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 那其中，不止有「你们」，还有「无数个你们」。
t_en: And it won't just be "you" in it. There will be "countless numbers of you."

t_ch: 在宇宙的「记忆」里，翁法罗斯将是一个辉煌、壮丽、英雄辈出的世界。
t_en: Amphoreus will be a glorious and magnificent world of heroes in the universe's "memories."

t_ch: 所以，为这个我们深爱的世界……
t_en: Hence, for this world we so deeply love...

t_ch: 写下。结局吧。
t_en: Let us. Write. Its ending.

t_ch: 踏上前来。在「开拓」的见证下，将「救世主」共通的名字，传唱后世吧——
t_en: Step forward. With the Trailblaze as witness, let the name shared by all Deliverers be sung unto eternity...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「无名的英雄，卡厄斯兰那」！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Nameless Hero, Khaslana!</color>

t_ch: 兜兜转转这么久，终于可以大步流星啦！
t_en: After running all around the place, we're finally making big strides!

t_ch: 时间的尽头，生命将点亮温暖的烛光，压倒「毁灭」的劫火。
t_en: At the end of time, life will illuminate the warm candlelight, subduing the flames of the Destruction.

t_ch: 抛却身后的一切，只留一场酣畅淋漓的死斗！
t_en: Cast everything behind you. All that's left is a thrilling, relentless deathmatch!

t_ch: 最后的课题，无需再以理性求解。尽情实践批判吧。
t_en: The final problem no longer requires a rational solution. Feel free to critique it to your heart's content.

t_ch: 被那道裂缝撕开的星空，就是最后一处需要我们治愈的伤痕。
t_en: The starry sky marred by that rift is the last scar that needs to be healed.

t_ch: 那神礼官允诺的，终究是一条如此狭隘的道路。可怜。
t_en: That Theoros's promise still turned out to be such a narrow road. Pity.

t_ch: 不再需要歌声，而要用胜利的呐喊，为来日奏响序曲。
t_en: There is no longer any need for songs. Let the triumphant roar of victory serve as the prelude to what lies ahead.

t_ch: 带着三千万世期许，飞跃最后的门径。去书写我们自己的预言吧！
t_en: With thirty million cycles worth of hope, we will soar through the last gate and write our own prophecy!

t_ch: 失却的一切，尽数汇集。用它编织胜利吧，救世主们——
t_en: All that is lost has now been gathered here. Use it to weave victory, Deliverers...

t_ch: 向着逐火真正的终点。
t_en: Towards the true end of the Flame-Chase.

t_ch: 「毁灭」的胎盘，蠢蠢欲动……
t_en: The Destruction's placenta is getting restless...

t_ch: 一次又一次，白厄向权杖发起冲击，孤身一人。
t_en: Again and again, Phainon launched his attack against the Scepter alone.

t_ch: 但这一世……
t_en: But this cycle...

t_ch: 我们追上他了。
t_en: We've caught up to him.

s_ch: 毁灭的容器，卡厄斯兰那
t_ch: 我看见。灰白的黎明。升起。
t_en: I see. The pale dawn. Breaking.

s_ch: 毁灭的容器，卡厄斯兰那
t_ch: 焚身。作薪。
t_en: With my flesh. As kindling.

s_ch: 毁灭的容器，卡厄斯兰那
t_ch: 为来世破晓。引火吧！
t_en: Light the first dawn. Of the new world!

s_ch: 毁灭的容器，卡厄斯兰那
t_ch: 切勿，犹疑。救世主。
t_en: Do not. Hesitate. Deliverer.

s_ch: 毁灭的容器，卡厄斯兰那
t_ch: 击碎此身。杀死。毁灭的巨人。
t_en: Destroy this body. Kill. The giant of Destruction.

t_ch: 我不想看到任何人牺牲…
t_en: I don't want to see anyone sacrifice themselves...

t_ch: 也许，还有其他办法…
t_en: Perhaps... There's still another way...

t_ch: 我明白，为了翁法罗斯！
t_en: I understand. For Amphoreus!

s_ch: 毁灭的容器，卡厄斯兰那
t_ch: 怒火，在溢出。放下！迟疑……
t_en: The fury. Overflowing. Put down! Your hesitation...

s_ch: 毁灭的容器，卡厄斯兰那

t_ch: 在「爱」的充盈下，挥洒光吧。

t_en: The progress of Era Nova has been interrupted?

t_en: "But we have a bad feeling about this!"

t_ch: 银河的「第四时刻」——是为「铁墓」的加冕！
t_en: The "Fourth Instant" of the cosmos... is the coronation of Irontomb!

t_ch: 十三声心跳过后——
t_en: After thirteen heartbeats...

t_ch: 光会创造天地！
t_en: Light will create the heavens and earth!

t_ch: 史诗的尾声，我们一同书写结局！
t_en: We'll write the saga's ending together!

t_ch: 谢谢姐妹，咱们一起把这铁皮人射穿！
t_en: Thanks, sister! We'll shoot through that tin man together!

t_ch: 后方有我，愿翁法罗斯一往无前。
t_en: I've got your back. May there be nothing that stands in Amphoreus's way.

t_ch: 诚如涟漪所述，这是一段浪漫的旅途。
t_en: This is a romantic journey, just as the ripples stated.

t_ch: 凯旋的门径，由*我们*开启！
t_en: We will open the gate of triumph!

t_ch: 向你致意，为终结一切的征途！
t_en: I salute you. For the campaign that will end all things!

t_ch: 我会传递阁下的馈赠，如拥抱一般温暖。
t_en: I will pass on your gift, lady. It's as warm as an embrace.

t_ch: 不错，我来回以最盛大的魔术！
t_en: Not bad. Let me respond with the greatest magic trick!

t_ch: 如此和煦的风，让我添上晨曦的微光吧。
t_en: What a warm wind. Let me add some rays of dawn.

t_ch: 谢谢啊！欠你个人情，就用表现来还吧！
t_en: Thanks! I owe you one! Lemme repay it with my actions.

t_ch: 值得封赏的祝福，律法必将完成征讨。
t_en: A blessing worthy of rewards. The Law will complete its campaign.

t_ch: 小海兔，在命运的海洋中，一同掀起巨浪吧。
t_en: Let us stir up torrents together in the ocean of fate.

t_ch: 当然，要有光。
t_en: Indeed. There must be light.

t_ch: 话虽如此，距离光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年，还有好久好久呢。
t_en: You say that, but it's gonna be ages till we reach Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>.

t_ch: 我是能利用「岁月」的夹缝，但{NICKNAME}和丹恒…不会要干等好几千年吧？
t_en: I can make use of the crevices of Time, but surely {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng won't have to wait around for a few thousand years... right?

t_ch: 倒也不必。只需安静沉睡，「识刻锚」自会将我们唤醒。
t_en: That won't be necessary. We can simply sleep, and the "Chronocognitive Anchor" will wake us up.

t_ch: 永夜之帷，还有磐岩之脊？
t_en: Veil of Evernight? Pillar of Stone?

t_ch: 没错。咱俩都成了新世界的一部分，现在就等你啦。
t_en: That's right. We've both become a part of the new world. Just waiting for you now.

t_ch: 没想到，你们也在这里。
t_en: I didn't expect you'd both be here.

t_ch: 没想到的是你。咱俩早就是新世界的一部分了，你是最后一个。
t_en: We've both become a part of the new world ages ago. You're the last, slowpoke.

t_ch: 似乎是受「开拓」影响，我们的意识得以跨越天地，与彼此对话。
t_en: Our consciousnesses can converse with each other across the heavens and the earth, possibly due to the influence of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 如今，我与这片「大地」相连，能感受到每一座山脉的呼吸……
t_en: I am now connected with this Earth, and I can feel the breath of every mountain range...

t_ch: 我看见，最高的那座名为「奥赫玛」，圣城的身影已初见雏形。
t_en: I see that the tallest among them is named "Okhema," and the form of the holy city is already taking shape.

t_ch: 意思是，属于你的舞台快搭好了。要不学习下刻法勒，先去发表一番神谕再入睡？
t_en: In other words, your stage is almost set. Do you wanna take a leaf out of Kephale's book and make some prophecies before your nap?

t_ch: 不过，变化的不止有我们。
t_en: But we're not the only ones who have changed.

t_ch: 就在刚才，识刻锚传来讯息：<color=#dbc291ff>「铁墓」对「再创世」产生了反应。</color>
t_en: The Chronocognitive Anchor just transmitted a message stating that <color=#dbc291ff>"Irontomb" has reacted to the "Era Nova."</color>

t_ch: 在{NICKNAME}背负起三千万世「记忆」的同时……
t_en: The moment when {NICKNAME} bore the weight of thirty million cycles of "memories"...

t_ch: 恐怕，它也吞下了三千万世的「毁灭」。
t_en: ...Was probably also when the Scepter devoured thirty million cycles of Destruction.

t_ch: 在所难免，我早有准备。
t_en: It's bound to happen, and I've long prepared for that.

t_ch: 不能再等了，必须阻止铁墓。
t_en: We can't wait any longer. We must stop Irontomb.

t_ch: 该去接过白厄背负的重担了…
t_en: It's time to take over the burden that Phainon has been carrying...

t_ch: 其实，{NICKNAME}，你不必独自背负这个世界的。
t_en: Y'know, {NICKNAME}... You don't have to shoulder this world all on your own.

t_ch: 自登上列车的那天起，这趟旅行就没有「一个人」的说法。所以这次，没人会在时间的尽头独自前行。
t_en: After someone boards the Express, the word "alone" ceases to exist. So as we reach the end of time, no one will be left to face it alone.

t_ch: 我和丹恒特地赶来，就是为了跟你说这事。
t_en: Dan Heng and I came here to specifically tell you that.

t_ch: 记得，这不是你一人的「负世」。
t_en: Remember, this world is not a burden you bear alone.

t_ch: 而是星穹列车共同的「开拓」。
t_en: It's a journey we Trailblaze together, alongside all of the Express.

t_ch: 当然，谢谢你们，好伙伴。
t_en: I know. Thank you, my good friends.

t_ch: 不用提醒，我一直记得你们。
t_en: No need to remind me. You are always in my mind.

t_ch: 真是的，不能让我当一回主角？
t_en: Seriously, can't you let me be the protagonist for once?

t_ch: 后面有的是你表现的机会啦。
t_en: There'll be plenty of time for you to show off in the future.

t_ch: 她的意思是，英雄只在最关键的时刻登场。
t_en: She meant to say that a hero only turns up at the most pivotal moment.

t_ch: 好啦。我和丹恒该去睡个好——长的觉了。替我们看好这个世界，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Alright, it's time for Dan Heng and me to go have a super long nap. Look after this world for us, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 前路漫漫，但我们会在终点等你。
t_en: The road ahead is long, but we'll be waiting for you at the end.

t_ch: 一定，要再见面啊。
t_en: We'll definitely meet again.

t_ch: （启程前，再看一眼海的对面吧。）
t_en: (Let's take one more look at the other side of the sea before we set off.)

t_ch: （黑潮的气息，彻底平静了。）
t_en: (The scent of the black tide is now completely calm.)

t_ch: （三千万次轮回的起点，终于迎来了……）
t_en: (At last, the starting point of thirty million cycles... has finally welcomed...)

t_ch: …第一次终点。
t_en: ...Its first end.

t_ch: 也是最后一次，对吗？
t_en: And the final end, right?

t_ch: 我听不见他的声音。那里没有为他绽放的花，也没有属于他的星星。
t_en: I can't hear his voice. There are no flowers there that bloom for him, nor is there a star that is his.

t_ch: 白厄…是唯一一个，没能抵达新世界的人。
t_en: Phainon... is the only one who didn't reach the new world.

t_ch: 他用牺牲，换来了这片宁静。
t_en: He gave everything to obtain this momentary peace.

t_ch: 要相信他，我们一定会重逢。
t_en: Trust in him, we'll meet again for sure.

t_ch: 白厄在铁墓体内等待我们。
t_en: Phainon awaits us inside the Irontomb.

t_ch: 你看，那道照彻树庭的金光，依然在天地间徘徊。就像翁法罗斯的神谕。
t_en: Look. The golden light that shone upon the Grove still meanders between heaven and earth, like the prophecies of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 那一定是他留下的指引，指向「毁灭」…最深的黑夜。
t_en: It has to be a sign he left behind. It points towards the Destruction... and the deepest night.

t_ch: 还记得吗？上一次启程时，也是在这里，我问过{NICKNAME}……
t_en: Do you still remember what I asked you at this exact spot the last time we set off?

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，准备好成为英雄了吗？」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}, are you ready to become a hero?"

t_ch: 那时候，你还在为「负世」的职责而烦恼，思考自己该扮演什么样的角色。但现在，所有人都给出了回答……
t_en: You were still burdened by the weight of Worldbearing back then, still unsure of the role you were meant to play. But now... everyone has already given you the answer.

t_ch: 史诗中的「英雄」，只是在每一个被世界需要的场合，恰到好处地出现在那里。
t_en: The "heroes" of legends were just at the right place at the right time when the world needed a hero.

t_ch: 正如你的到来，让翁法罗斯的命运再度开始转动。
t_en: Just like how your arrival kick-started Amphoreus's fate once more.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>一个人的性格，就是{F#她}{M#他}的命运。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>A person's personality is their destiny.</color>

t_ch: 我们所有人一起，走向最好的结局。
t_en: Together, we'll all make it to the best possible ending.

t_ch: 「我们」…「最好」…都是很美的词呢。
t_en: "We." "Best." ...Those are such beautiful words.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。刚才那些话，也是在为我自己加油打气。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I was also trying to cheer myself up with what I said.

t_ch: 毕竟，在真正为这个故事写下结局前，我也必须鼓起勇气，和你一起出发……
t_en: After all, before we truly compose the end of this story, I must also pluck up the courage to head off with you...

t_ch: 去面对一份……
t_en: And face...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>被我遗忘了太久，也抗拒了太久的「记忆」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>A "memory" that I have forgotten for too long... and have denied for too long.</color>

t_ch: 好黑。这里是……
t_en: It's so dark. What is this place...?

t_ch: 无名泰坦大墓，「记忆」最深的角落。
t_en: The Great Tomb of the nameless Titan. The deepest recesses of "memory."

t_ch: 也是，「昔涟」的诞生之地。
t_en: Also... the place where "Cyrene" was born.

t_ch: 不是哀丽秘榭吗？
t_en: Weren't you born in Aedes Elysiae?

t_ch: 难道…你取回失去的记忆了？
t_en: You got your lost memories back?

t_ch: 诞生之地？什么意思…
t_en: Birthplace? What do you mean...?

t_ch: 对不起呀，{NICKNAME}。这一路上，取回的记忆越多，我心中的违和感就越是强烈。
t_en: My apologies, {NICKNAME}. The more memories I got back along the way, the more I felt that something wasn't right.

t_ch: 总有一种不安挥之不去。就好像在哀丽秘榭，我望着水面，分不清水中的我和岸边的我，哪一个才是真正的我。
t_en: There's a sort of anxiety I can't get rid of. It's like when I was back in Aedes Elysiae, when the reflections in the water always made me wonder... which is the real me? The one reflected in the water, or the one standing on the shore?

t_ch: 但现在，我终于明白了。
t_en: But I finally get it now.

t_ch: 你看，{NICKNAME}。那面墙上的字，就是答案呀。
t_en: Look, {NICKNAME}. The words on that wall are the answer.

t_ch: 「一、二、三、四、五、六、七」……
t_en: "One, two, three, four, five, six, seven"...

t_ch: 「哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻」……
t_en: "Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti"...

t_ch: 不成调的小曲，是小妖精们的歌谣。
t_en: That rhymeless tune is the lullaby of little fairies.

t_ch: 「一如既往，我会把这本书念给你听……」
t_en: "As always, I'll read this book to you..."

t_ch: 「这样一来，它就不再是『昔涟』一个人的回忆。」
t_en: "That way, it won't just be 'Cyrene's' memories alone."

t_ch: 我一直以为，自己是逐火之旅的讲述者。
t_en: I've always thought that I was the narrator of the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 但讲故事的人，原来……
t_en: But as it turns out, the narrator...

t_ch: 也是最专心的「听众」呀。
t_en: ...is also the most devoted "audience."

t_ch: 什么意思…
t_en: What do you mean...

t_ch: 我相信每一个你。
t_en: I believe in every version of you.

t_ch: 谢谢，{NICKNAME}。「每一个你」…听着真温柔呢。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. "Every single Cyrene"... That sounds so kind.

t_ch: 我才是讲故事的人。
t_en: I'm the one who tells the story.

t_ch: 很主动的发言哦？但…谢谢，{NICKNAME}。真令人安心呢。
t_en: That's pretty forward of you, you know? Still... thank you, {NICKNAME}. That's very reassuring.

t_ch: 「再创世」的瞬间，「记忆」的质料包裹住我。在晶莹的水晶中，我看见了无数个「昔涟」……
t_en: At the moment of Era Nova, I was enveloped by the texture of "memories." With the glistening crystal, I saw countless "Cyrenes"...

t_ch: 还有，无数个自己。
t_en: As well as countless versions of me.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这就是「记忆」的最后一块拼图啦。
t_en: This is the final puzzle piece of the "memories," {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 一座诞生自「智识」的囚笼，一片消陨于「毁灭」的坟茔。
t_en: A prison born of the Erudition. A grave annihilated in the Destruction.

t_ch: 那无人知晓的、孑然的神明，不应存在的第十三位泰坦……
t_en: That unknown solitary god, the Thirteenth Titan who should not exist...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>最初的智种，德谬歌…它就在这里。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The first Nouspore, the Demiurge... is right here.</color>

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭，真安静啊。
t_en: Aedes Elysiae is so quiet.

t_ch: 嗯。和记忆中一模一样。
t_en: Mmm. Just like how I remember.

t_ch: 又一次，我们回到了这里。
t_en: Here we are once more.

t_ch: 昔…涟……
t_en: Cy...rene...

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，终于…你醒了呀。」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}... You're... finally awake."

t_ch: 你的声音，好遥远…
t_en: You sound... so... far away...

t_ch: 其他人，在哪里…
t_en: Where's... everyone... else...

t_ch: 我们，还没有输…
t_en: We.. haven't lost... yet...

t_ch: 「别担心，在这里…『时间』是静止的。」
t_en: "Don't worry... 'Time' does not flow in this place."

t_ch: 「群星陷入了沉默。我能感知的一切，都在被『铁墓』消解……」
t_en: "All the stars have been silenced. 'Irontomb' is dissolving everything that I can sense..."

t_ch: 它在解析一切生命行为…
t_en: It's parsing all life activities...

t_ch: 然后，将它们转化为「毁灭」。
t_en: Then... converting them to "Destruction."
